---
title: "Snapchat"
platform_slug: "snapchat"
sources:
  ugc:
    BR: data/global/snapchat/ugc.yml
    EU: data/global/snapchat/ugc.yml
    UK: data/global/snapchat/ugc.yml
  ads:
    BR: data/global/snapchat/ads.yml
    EU: data/regional/EU/snapchat/ads.yml
    UK: data/global/snapchat/ads.yml
---

## Transparency Assessment


```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
import sys
from pathlib import Path
project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))
from utils.responses_aggregator import generate_platform_question_sections
```

```{python}
#| label: platform-summary
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from utils.platform_summary import generate_platform_summary
generate_platform_summary("snapchat")
```

Snapchat was assessed on both the UGC and ADS frameworks across three regions (BR, EU, and UK). On the UGC framework, all four special criteria (UGC_SC1–SC4) and every other criterion received a "no" answer, reflecting a complete absence of research-oriented data access mechanisms for user-generated content; the platform offers no public API, no graphical tool, and no structured data access program for extracting UGC in any of the assessed regions. On the ADS framework, Brazil and the UK likewise scored zero across all criteria, as no advertising data access tool of any kind is available for those markets. In the EU, Snapchat nominally provides the `Ads Gallery API` and an Ads Gallery GUI scoped to EU-delivered advertising content, and the API documentation is publicly accessible and includes detailed error explanations; however, all three special criteria (AD_SC1–SC3) remain "no" because the API consistently returned a "too many requests" error during independent testing and the GUI did not yield extractable structured data, making functional verification impossible. The overall transparency posture is Not Available for UGC across all regions, and ranges from Not Available (BR, UK) to Irrelevant (EU) for ADS, indicating that independent research on Snapchat's content and advertising ecosystems is effectively blocked by the absence of operational data access infrastructure.

## Detailed Assessment


## User-Generated Content

```{python}
#| label: ugc-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="snapchat",
    question_type="ugc",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```

## Advertising

```{python}
#| label: ads-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="snapchat",
    question_type="ads",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
